1.question:
The angle of projection for a projectile to have same horizontal range and maximum height is:
(a) tan^(-1)(2)
(b) tan^(-1)(4)
(c) tan^(-1)(1/4)
(d) tan^(-1)(1/2)

A particle moves with constant acceleration. If its initial velocity is 5 m/s and final velocity after 4 s is 13 m/s, the acceleration is:
(a) 1 m/s²
(b) 2 m/s²
(c) 3 m/s²
(d) 4 m/s²

The escape velocity from Earth is approximately:
(a) 7.9 km/s
(b) 11.2 km/s
(c) 15 km/s
(d) 9.8 km/s

A spring of force constant k is cut into two equal parts. New spring constant of each part:
(a) k/2
(b) k
(c) 2k
(d) 4k

If roots of x^2−5x+k=0 differ by 1, then k=
(a) 5
(b) 6
(c) 4
(d) 9

Which molecule has maximum bond angle?
(a)NH₃
(b)H₂O
(c)CH₄
(d)BF₃

Which is a reducing sugar?
(a) Sucrose
(b) Glucose
(c) Starch
(d) Cellulose

Major product of: Propene + HBr in presence of peroxide:
(a) 2-bromopropane
(b) 1-bromopropane
(c) 3-bromopropane
(d) bromobenzene

Which gives white precipitate with ammoniacal AgNO₃?
(a) Ethene
(b) Ethane
(c) Propyne
(d) Ethyne

If y=x^sinx, then ln(y)=
(a) x sinx
(b) sinxlnx
(c) cosxlnx
(d) xcosx

4.question:
A man said: "The sister of the son of my father's wife is my aunt." How is the speaker related to that aunt's brother?

            a. nephew
            b. son
            c. cousin
            d. brother

A woman introduces a man: "His wife's father-in-law is the only son of my paternal grandfather." How is the man related to the woman?
            
            a. brother
            b. cousin
            c. uncle
            d. husband

Aryan's sister's husband's mother is Priya. Priya has only one son. Priya's husband is Grandpa Ram. How is Grandpa Ram related to Aryan?
            
            a. paternal grandfather
            b. maternal grandfather
            c. father-in-law
            d. grand-uncle

Decode the chain:
                A → B: A is parent of B
                A ← B: A is child of B
                A ↔ B: A is spouse of B
                A ⇒ B: A is sibling of B

                Chain: P ↔ Q ← R ⇒ S → T ↔ U

            How is U related to P?, The chain is given below:
                P ↔ Q: P and Q are spouses
                Q ← R: Q is child of R
                R ⇒ S: R and S are siblings
                S → T: S is parent of T
                T ↔ U: T and U are spouses

            a. daughter-in-law
            b. sister-in-law
            c. niece
            d. granddaughter-in-law

Decode the chain and select ALL true statements:
                A → B: A is parent of B
                A ↔ B: A is spouse of B
                A ⇒ B: A is sibling of B
                A ⊕ B: A is grandparent of B

                The Chain: W ⊕ X ↔ Y → Z ⇒ V
            
            Now for the given statements below:
                W ⊕ X: W is grandparent of X
                X ↔ Y: X and Y are spouses
                Y → Z: Y is parent of Z
                Z ⇒ V: Z and V are siblings
            
            Choose the one or more options:
            a. X and Y are spouses
            b. Z and V are siblings
            c. W is grandparent of Z
            d. Y is parent of V
            e. W is great-grandparent of Z

Decode using the key and select ALL true statements:
                P # Q → P is son-in-law of Q
                P @ Q → P is sister of Q
                P & Q → P is father of Q
                P ! Q → P is wife of Q

                Chain: A & B @ C ! D & E

            Now for the given statements below:
                A & B → A is father of B
                B @ C → B is sister of C (so A is father of C too)
                C ! D → C is wife of D
                D & E → D is father of E
            
            Choose the one or more options:
            a. A is grandfather of E
            b. D is son-in-law of A
            c. B is aunt of E
            d. C is daughter-in-law of A
            e. E is grandchild of A
